I do recommend this game to play with families and friends, but with strangers, it's another experience.
If you host a lobby, you should not be able to get vote kicked by others. I, the host of a lobby, was vote kicked because supposedly I set the speed too low.
"We're running a fckin snail marathon, mate." 
"My grandpa can fck faster than this."
It's my lobby. My rules, and if others don't enjoy it, they can leave and find another to their liking. I do not recommend this with strangers because very often, you'll find those who believe the world revolves around them, and worst of it, everyone tags along against you. I was also playing with my younger sister who had just witnessed me getting kicked out of my own lobby. The fix that I want to this game is that the host cannot be vote-kicked whatsoever.
Please, PLEASE, fix this, for the sake of me and my sister's sanity, and probably thousands, if not, millions more.

review:
Among Us is one of the most engaging and memorable multiplayer games I have ever played. Despite its simple appearance, the game offers a surprisingly deep social experience that encourages teamwork, communication, critical thinking, and strategy.

One of the greatest strengths of Among Us is how it brings people together. Every match creates unique situations where players must work as a team to complete tasks while also trying to determine who can be trusted. The discussions and debates that take place during meetings are often intense, exciting, and genuinely entertaining.

The game's design is easy to understand, making it accessible to players of all skill levels. At the same time, mastering deception, observation, and deduction provides a rewarding challenge that keeps the gameplay fresh even after many hours.

The developers have also done an excellent job supporting the game with new maps, roles, customization options, and quality-of-life improvements. These updates have helped maintain the game's popularity and replay value over time.

Overall, Among Us is a fantastic example of how a simple concept can create an incredibly compelling experience. Its combination of strategy, social interaction, and suspense makes it a standout title that continues to be enjoyable years after its release. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a fun and meaningful multiplayer game.

review:
[b] Плюсы [/b]

- Простые правила и интуитивный интерфейс
- Сильная социальная динамика (эмоции, блеф и обсуждения)
- Высокая реиграбельность за счёт разных групп игроков, настроек и карт
- Короткие матчи
- Сообщество и моды.

[b] Минусы [/b]

- Плохо работает с неподходящей компанией (тролли, читеры, молчуны)
- Токсичность и мошенничество (встречаются читеры и токсичные игроки)
- После многих часов можно почувствовать однообразие механик (особенно при однотипных группах игроков).

[b] Вывод [/b]

Идеально подходит для вечеринок, стримов и весёлых посиделок с друзьями. Рекомендуется тем, кто любит общение, дедукцию и быстрые сессии.

review:
Among Us 8/10
İnceleme:
Abi bu oyunda hani o her şeyin sustuğu, haritanın zifiri karanlığa büründüğü o lanet olası sabotaj anları var ya... Işıklar kesilmiş, göz gözü görmüyor, herkes el yordamıyla panoya ulaşmaya çalışıyor. İşte tam o karanlıkta yanından geçen gölgeye dikkat edeceksin. Tam köşeyi dönüyorsun, kafanı bir çeviriyorsun; yerde bizim ekipten birinin cesedi duruyor, başında da o tescilli namussuz, sinsi sinsi bekliyor.

Hemen o acil durum butonuna elini öyle bir vuruyorsun ki, lobideki veletlerin kulak zarı patlıyor amına koyayım! Discord’da mikrofonu açıp, bu sefer ses tonunu iyice ağırlaştırarak raconu koyuyorsun:

"Ulan az önce elektrik odasının önünde o karanlıkta sinsice bekleyen o fırıldak kimdi?! Karşıma geçmiş bana masal anlatıyor gavat! Siz daha dün portakal gazıyla gezerken, biz bu geminin nizamını sağlıyorduk. Bana bak impostor piç; sen değil, senin o arkandaki o akıl hocaların, o seni buraya salan a babaların gelsin! Çıkarın ulan maskenizi, buranın tek bir abisi var, o da benim amına koyayım!"

Lobi yine birbirine giriyor, "Abi adam çok kararlı konuşuyor, kesin katil o değil" diyerek arkanda hizalanıyorlar. Sen o sırada oylamayı başlatıyorsun, karşıdaki şüpheli herifi gözünün yaşına bakmadan uzay boşluğuna fırlattırıyorsun. Adam geminin camından süzülerek uzayda kaybolurken arkasından bakıp sigaranı yakıyorsun. İşte katıksız manipülasyon, işte kitle yönetimi budur!

Oyunu "Kafayı Sıyırtmalı" Yapan Diğer Detaylar:
O Bitmek Bilmeyen "Kamera Dikizleme" Kanseri: Sen haritada namusunla, şerefinle çöp fırlatma görevi yapıyorsun, adamın teki gitmiş güvenlik odasındaki ekranın başına, gözünü kırpmadan senin her adımını izliyor. Ulan röntgenci misin, uzay bekçisi misin be herif? Git iki dakika reaktörün vidalarını sık amına koyayım! Millet can derdinde, dayı orada televizyon izler gibi bizi kesiyor. Senin vizyonunu sikeyim!

Arkadaşının "Kanka Valla Ben Yanlışlıkla Bastım" Tribi: Maç daha yeni başlamış, herkes daha ilk görevine doğru iki adım atmış; gruptaki o tescilli salak gidip haritanın ortasındaki butona cart diye basıyor. review_english: Among Us 8 10 Review Man, you know those damn sabotage moments in this game when everything is silent and the map is in pitch darkness... The lights are off, no one can see, everyone is trying to reach the board by groping. That's when you'll pay attention to the shadow passing by you in the dark. You turn the corner, turn your head, and there is the corpse of one of our team on the ground, with that registered dishonor waiting insidiously over him. You immediately slam your hand on that emergency button so hard that the eardrums of the brats in the lobby explode! You turn on the microphone in Discord, this time you raise your tone of voice even more and say the racon: "Who was that whirlwind that was waiting in the dark in front of the electrical room just now?! He came up to me and was telling me stories, asshole! Just yesterday, while you were traveling with orange gas, we were ensuring the order of this ship. Look at me, impostor bastard, not you, but those mentors behind you, those fathers who put you here! Take off your mask, the only place in this place is here." He has a brother, fuck him too!” The lobby gathers together again, and they line up behind you, saying, "Brother, he speaks very decisively, he is definitely not the murderer." At that moment, you start the voting and throw the suspicious guy across the street into space without hesitation. As the man glides through the window of the ship and disappears into space, you look after him and light your cigarette. This is pure manipulation, this is mass management! Other Details That Make the Game "Brilliant" That Never-Ending Cancer of "Camera Peeping" You are doing your duty of throwing garbage on the map with honor and dignity, some guy goes to the screen in the security room and watches your every step without blinking an eye. Are you a voyeur or a space ranger, dude? Go tighten the screws on the reactor for two minutes, fuck you! People are worried about their lives, the uncle is there interrupting us as if we were watching television. Fuck your vision! His friend's "Dude, I Pressed It By Accidentally" Tribi The match has just started, everyone has just taken two steps towards their first task, that registered idiot in the group goes and presses the button in the middle of the map. The screen suddenly turns on, everyone asks, "What happened? Is there a dead body?" he asks. The guy says from the microphone, "Dude, I was bored, so I just pressed it." Fuck that finger of yours and the button you press! You literally send the guy into space as a penalty in the 10th second of the match. Summary I turned on the lights, found the body, followed the brats in the lobby, put my racon on, and sent the accomplice into space. Fuck the captain and the father of this ship! Press that ready button, we continue to distribute justice in space!

review:
Among Us : un phénomène vidéoludique, social et culturel du XXIe siècle
Introduction

L’histoire du jeu vidéo est marquée par l’apparition de titres qui dépassent leur simple statut de divertissement pour devenir de véritables phénomènes culturels. Certains jeux révolutionnent les technologies, d’autres introduisent de nouveaux genres ou de nouvelles façons de jouer. Parmi les jeux ayant profondément marqué la culture numérique contemporaine figure Among Us, développé par Innersloth.

À première vue, Among Us apparaît comme un jeu relativement simple. Les participants incarnent les membres d’un équipage spatial devant accomplir différentes tâches dans un vaisseau. Cependant, parmi eux se cachent un ou plusieurs imposteurs dont l’objectif est d’éliminer discrètement les autres joueurs. Cette mécanique, inspirée des jeux de société de déduction sociale, transforme chaque partie en un mélange complexe de coopération, de méfiance, de stratégie et de communication.

Bien que publié en 2018, Among Us connaît une popularité mondiale exceptionnelle en 2020. Ce succès tardif s’explique par plusieurs facteurs : la diffusion massive du jeu par les créateurs de contenu, son accessibilité sur appareils mobiles, son faible coût et surtout son adéquation avec les besoins sociaux d’une période marquée par les confinements liés à la pandémie de COVID-19.

L’étude de Among Us permet ainsi d’explorer de nombreuses problématiques. Comment un jeu indépendant relativement discret est-il devenu un phénomène mondial ? Pourquoi ses mécaniques de mensonge et de déduction fascinent-elles autant les joueurs ? Quel rôle ont joué les réseaux sociaux et les plateformes de diffusion dans son succès ? Enfin, que révèle Among Us sur les comportements humains, la communication et les interactions sociales à l’ère numérique ?

Pour répondre à ces questions, cette dissertation analysera successivement la naissance du jeu, ses mécanismes ludiques, les facteurs de son succès, son impact culturel, sa dimension psychologique et sa place dans l’histoire du jeu vidéo.

I. Les origines de Among Us
A. La création du projet

Among Us est développé par Innersloth, un petit studio indépendant fondé par plusieurs créateurs passionnés. Contrairement aux grandes entreprises du secteur disposant de budgets considérables, Innersloth travaille avec des ressources limitées.

Le projet repose sur une idée simple : adapter dans un environnement numérique les mécanismes de déduction sociale présents dans certains jeux de société. L’objectif consiste à créer une expérience accessible, rapide à comprendre et capable de générer des interactions fortes entre les participants.

Dès le départ, les développeurs misent davantage sur la qualité des interactions humaines que sur les performances techniques ou les graphismes spectaculaires.

B. Une sortie discrète

Lors de sa sortie en 2018, Among Us ne rencontre qu’un succès modeste.

Le marché du jeu vidéo est extrêmement compétitif et de nombreux titres indépendants peinent à attirer l’attention du public. Pendant plusieurs mois, Among Us reste relativement méconnu.

Pourtant, les bases de son futur succès sont déjà présentes :

gameplay simple ;
forte rejouabilité ;
accessibilité ;
communication entre joueurs ;
potentiel humoristique.
C. La persévérance des développeurs

Malgré une visibilité limitée, les créateurs continuent à améliorer le jeu.

Ils corrigent des bugs, ajoutent des fonctionnalités et restent à l’écoute de leur communauté.

Cette persévérance joue un rôle essentiel dans la transformation progressive du titre en phénomène mondial.

II. Les mécanismes fondamentaux du jeu
A. Le principe de la déduction sociale

Le cœur de Among Us repose sur la déduction sociale.

Chaque partie oppose deux groupes :

les membres d’équipage ;
les imposteurs.

Les premiers doivent accomplir leurs tâches et identifier les coupables.

Les seconds doivent saboter les opérations et éliminer discrètement leurs victimes.

Cette opposition crée une tension constante.

B. Les tâches

Les tâches représentent l’activité principale des équipiers.

Elles consistent généralement à effectuer des actions simples :

réparer des équipements ;
connecter des câbles ;
scanner des objets ;
gérer des systèmes électroniques.

Ces activités donnent aux joueurs une mission concrète tout en créant des occasions d’observation.

C. Les sabotages

Les imposteurs disposent d’outils spéciaux.

Ils peuvent :

couper les lumières ;
perturber les communications ;
provoquer une crise d’oxygène ;
déclencher un réacteur critique.

Ces sabotages augmentent le chaos et compliquent l’identification des coupables.

III. La psychologie du mensonge
A. Mentir pour survivre

Among Us repose largement sur la capacité des imposteurs à mentir.

Ils doivent construire des récits crédibles, inventer des alibis et convaincre les autres de leur innocence.

Cette mécanique transforme le jeu en véritable laboratoire social.

B. La détection du mensonge

Les équipiers cherchent constamment des indices.

Ils analysent :

les déplacements ;
les contradictions ;
les témoignages ;
les comportements suspects.

Cette recherche de la vérité constitue l’une des principales sources de plaisir du jeu.

C. Les erreurs humaines

Même les meilleurs joueurs commettent des erreurs.

La mémoire imparfaite, la pression du temps et les émotions influencent les décisions.

Among Us met ainsi en évidence certaines limites du raisonnement humain.

IV. La communication comme élément central
A. Les réunions d’urgence

Lorsqu’un corps est découvert ou lorsqu’un joueur déclenche une réunion, une phase de discussion débute.

Cette étape est souvent la plus importante de la partie.

B. L’argumentation

Les participants doivent convaincre les autres.

Ils utilisent :

des preuves ;
des observations ;
des raisonnements ;
parfois de simples intuitions.

Le succès dépend souvent davantage de la qualité de l’argumentation que des actions réalisées dans le jeu lui-même.

C. Le vote

Après la discussion, les joueurs votent.

Cette mécanique démocratique donne au groupe le pouvoir de décider du sort de chaque suspect.

V. Le succès mondial de 2020
A. Le rôle des créateurs de contenu

Les plateformes de diffusion ont joué un rôle déterminant.

Des vidéastes et streamers populaires ont commencé à organiser des parties avec leurs communautés.

Le caractère imprévisible du jeu produisait des moments particulièrement divertissants.

B. La pandémie de COVID-19

La crise sanitaire mondiale modifie profondément les habitudes sociales.

De nombreuses personnes cherchent des moyens de rester en contact avec leurs amis à distance.

Among Us répond parfaitement à ce besoin.

Le jeu devient un espace de rencontre virtuelle.

C. Une accessibilité exceptionnelle

Par rapport à de nombreux jeux modernes, Among Us présente plusieurs avantages :

faible coût ;
compatibilité mobile ;
graphismes peu exigeants ;
règles simples.

Ces caractéristiques favorisent une diffusion rapide.

VI. Les dimensions sociologiques du jeu
A. La confiance

Toute société repose sur la confiance.

Among Us reproduit ce phénomène à petite échelle.

Les équipiers doivent collaborer tout en sachant qu’un traître se cache parmi eux.

B. La suspicion

Le doute devient omniprésent.

Même les comportements les plus innocents peuvent paraître suspects.

Cette dynamique rappelle certains mécanismes observés dans les groupes humains réels.

C. La formation de coalitions

Les joueurs créent souvent des alliances temporaires.

Ils partagent des informations et construisent des stratégies communes.

VII. Les influences des jeux de société
A. Mafia

Among Us s’inspire fortement du jeu de société connu sous le nom de Mafia.

Dans ce jeu, certains participants incarnent secrètement des criminels tandis que les autres tentent de les identifier.

B. Loups-garous

Le célèbre jeu Les Loups-garous de Thiercelieux repose sur des principes similaires.

On retrouve :

les rôles secrets ;
le mensonge ;
le vote collectif

review_english: Among Us a video game, social and cultural phenomenon of the 21st century Introduction The history of video games is marked by the appearance of titles which go beyond their simple entertainment status to become true cultural phenomena. Some games revolutionize technologies, others introduce new genres or new ways of playing. Among the games that have had a profound impact on contemporary digital culture is Among Us, developed by Innersloth. At first glance, Among Us appears to be a relatively simple game. Participants play the roles of members of a space crew who must accomplish different tasks on a ship. However, among them there are one or more impostors whose objective is to discreetly eliminate the other players. This mechanic, inspired by social deduction board games, transforms each game into a complex mix of cooperation, distrust, strategy and communication. Although published in 2018, Among Us enjoyed exceptional worldwide popularity in 2020. This late success can be explained by several factors: the massive distribution of the game by content creators, its accessibility on mobile devices, its low cost and above all its adequacy with the social needs of a period marked by confinements linked to the COVID-19 pandemic. The study of Among Us thus allows us to explore numerous issues. How did a relatively low-key indie game become a global phenomenon? Why do its lying and deduction mechanics fascinate players so much? What role did social networks and broadcast platforms play in its success? Finally, what does Among Us reveal about human behavior, communication and social interactions in the digital age? To answer these questions, this dissertation will successively analyze the birth of the game, its playful mechanisms, the factors of its success, its cultural impact, its psychological dimension and its place in the history of video games. I. The origins of Among Us A. The creation of the Among Us project is developed by Innersloth, a small independent studio founded by several passionate creators. Unlike large companies in the sector with considerable budgets, Innersloth works with limited resources. The project is based on a simple idea to adapt the social deduction mechanisms present in certain board games into a digital environment. The objective is to create an accessible experience, quick to understand and capable of generating strong interactions between participants. From the start, developers focus more on the quality of human interactions than on technical performance or spectacular graphics. B. A discreet release When it was released in 2018, Among Us only met with modest success. The video game market is extremely competitive and many independent titles struggle to attract public attention. For several months, Among Us remained relatively unknown. However, the foundations of its future success are already present simple gameplay strong replayability accessibility communication between players humorous potential. C. The perseverance of the developers Despite limited visibility, the creators continue to improve the game. They fix bugs, add features and listen to their community. This perseverance plays an essential role in the title's gradual transformation into a global phenomenon. II. The fundamental mechanics of the game A. The principle of social deduction The heart of Among Us is based on social deduction. Each game pits two groups against each other: the crew members and the impostors. The first must complete their tasks and identify the culprits. The latter must sabotage the operations and discreetly eliminate their victims. This opposition creates constant tension. B. Tasks Tasks represent the main activity of team members. They generally consist of performing simple actions repairing equipment connecting cables scanning objects managing electronic systems. These activities give players a concrete mission while creating opportunities for observation. C. Sabotage Imposters have special tools. They can cut the lights disrupt communications cause an oxygen crisis trigger a critical reactor. These sabotages increase chaos and make it difficult to identify the culprits. III. The Psychology of Lying A. Lying to survive Among Us relies heavily on the impostors' ability to lie. They must construct credible stories, invent alibis and convince others of their innocence. This mechanic transforms the game into a real social laboratory. B. Lie detection The teammates are constantly looking for clues. They analyze movements, contradictions, testimonies, suspicious behavior. This search for truth constitutes one of the main sources of pleasure in the game. C. Human errors Even the best players make mistakes. Imperfect memory, time pressure and emotions influence decisions. Among Us thus highlights certain limits of human reasoning. IV. Communication as a central element A. Emergency meetings When a body is discovered or when a player triggers a meeting, a discussion phase begins. This step is often the most important of the game. B. Argumentation Participants must convince others. They use evidence, observations, reasoning, sometimes simple intuitions. Success often depends more on the quality of the argument than on the actions carried out in the game itself. C. Voting After the discussion, the players vote. This democratic mechanism gives the group the power to decide the fate of each suspect. V. The global success of 2020 A. The role of content creators Broadcast platforms have played a decisive role. Popular videographers and streamers have started hosting games with their communities. The unpredictable nature of the game produced some particularly entertaining moments. B. The COVID-19 pandemic The global health crisis is profoundly changing social habits. Many people are looking for ways to stay in touch with their friends remotely. Among Us perfectly meets this need. The game becomes a virtual meeting space. C. Exceptional accessibility Compared to many modern games, Among Us has several advantages low cost mobile compatibility undemanding graphics simple rules. These characteristics promote rapid diffusion. VI. The sociological dimensions of the game A. Trust Every society is based on trust. Among Us reproduces this phenomenon on a small scale. The teammates must collaborate while knowing that a traitor is hiding among them. B. Suspicion Doubt becomes omnipresent. Even the most innocent behavior can seem suspicious. This dynamic is reminiscent of certain mechanisms observed in real human groups. C. The formation of coalitions Players often create temporary alliances. They share information and build common strategies. VII. Board game influences A. Mafia Among Us is heavily inspired by the board game known as Mafia. In this game, some participants secretly play criminals while the others try to identify them. B. Werewolves The famous game Les Loups-garous by Thiercelieux is based on similar principles. We find the secret roles the lie the collective vote

review:
Кризис жанра и синдром устаревшего хита

В свое время Among Us знатно встряхнула индустрию, вытащив жанр социальных игр из тесных рамок настолок и текстовых мафий прямо в топ Твича и Стима. Но то, что идеально работало в эпоху пандемии, сейчас вызывает лишь скуку. Время идет, идеи развиваются, а игра так и осталась заложником своей внезапной популярности, не сумев перерасти в нечто большее.

Почему базовая механика больше не вывозит

Главная проблема проекта сегодня — унылая рутина. Игровой процесс за обычного члена экипажа превратился в автоматическое выполнение примитивных мини-игр. Проводить карточкой по терминалу в сотый раз или соединять цветные проводки — это не геймплей, это скучная обязаловка, которая просто забивает таймлайны между раундами голосования.

Разработчики из InnerSloth пытаются исправить ситуацию, добавляя новые официальные роли вроде фантома, трекера или детектива. Но эти апдейты выглядят как попытка наспех закрыть дыры в старом корыте. Они не меняют суть: вы все так же бегаете по плоским двухмерным комнатам и пытаетесь вычислить предателя по обрывкам фраз в текстовом чате, если зашли поиграть с рандомами. Без сыгранной пачки друзей в Дискорде игра моментально ломается, превращаясь в хаос, где толпа сливает первого попавшегося просто потому, что кто-то капсом крикнул цвет в чат.

Конкуренты ушли далеко вперед

Жанр за эти годы развился, и на фоне современных альтернатив недостатки Among Us видны слишком отчетливо. Другие студии поняли, что людям нужно больше механик для тонкого блефа и психологического давления.

Взять ту же Goose Goose Duck — там огромное количество встроенных ролей доступно сразу из коробки, без костылей. Механики изначально заточены под создание диких ситуаций, а не под монотонный бег по коридорам.
Проекты вроде Lockdown Protocol вообще перенесли социальную дедукцию в полноценный 3D-формат с физикой, из-за чего паранойя работает совершенно иначе.
А симуляторы вроде Dale & Dawson Stationery Supplies превратили поиск предателей в офисную комедию, где сам процесс споров и отмазок доставляет тонну фана, даже если тебя быстро раскрыли.

На этом празднике жизни Among Us выглядит слишком бедно и стерильно.

Модификации как единственный способ играть

Показательно, что запускать чистую ванильную версию сейчас нет никакого смысла. Профессиональные игроки и стримеры давно сидят на жестких кастомных сборках вроде Town of Us, которые полностью перекраивают баланс, добавляют десятки новых ролей и усложняют правила до максимума.

Когда для адекватного геймплея вам кровь из носу нужно накатывать фанатские моды и собирать закрытые лобби, это лучший маркер проблем самой игры. Разработчики упустили момент, когда нужно было переписать движок, сделать нормальный встроенный позиционный войс-чат для всех платформ и развивать тактическую глубину, а не клепать платные скины и коллаборации. Как итог, Among Us остается важным историческим памятником, но играть в это сейчас, когда есть куча более динамичных и проработанных аналогов, просто неинтересно.

review_english: The crisis of the genre and the syndrome of an outdated hit At one time, Among Us significantly shook up the industry, pulling the genre of social games out of the tight confines of board games and text mafias straight into the top of Twitch and Steam. But what worked perfectly during the pandemic era now only causes boredom. Time passes, ideas develop, but the game remains hostage to its sudden popularity, failing to develop into something more. Why the basic mechanics no longer work The main problem of the project today is the dull routine. The gameplay for an ordinary crew member has turned into automatic execution of primitive mini-games. Swiping a card across a terminal for the hundredth time or connecting colored wires is not gameplay, it’s a boring chore that simply clogs up timelines between voting rounds. Developers from InnerSloth are trying to improve the situation by adding new official roles like phantom, tracker or detective. But these updates look like an attempt to hastily plug holes in an old trough. They don’t change the essence: you still run around flat two-dimensional rooms and try to figure out the traitor from scraps of phrases in a text chat if you came to play with randoms. Without a bunch of friends in Discord, the game instantly breaks down, turning into chaos, where the crowd dumps the first one they come across simply because someone shouted a color into the chat. Competitors have gone far ahead The genre has evolved over the years, and among modern alternatives, the shortcomings of Among Us are all too clearly visible. Other studios realized that people needed more mechanics for subtle bluffing and psychological pressure. Take the same Goose Goose Duck, there is a huge number of built-in roles available right out of the box, without crutches. The mechanics were initially designed to create wild situations, and not to monotonously run through the corridors. Projects like Lockdown Protocol have taken social deduction into a full-fledged 3D format with physics, which makes paranoia work completely differently. And simulators like Dale Dawson Stationery Supplies have turned the search for traitors into an office comedy, where the very process of arguing and making excuses provides a ton of fun, even if you are quickly discovered. At this celebration of life, Among Us looks too poor and sterile. Modifications as the only way to play It is significant that there is no point in running a pure vanilla version now. Professional players and streamers have long been stuck on hard custom builds like Town of Us, which completely reshape the balance, add dozens of new roles and complicate the rules to the maximum. When for adequate gameplay you need to download fan mods and collect closed lobbies, this is the best marker of the problems of the game itself. The developers missed the point when they needed to rewrite the engine, make a normal built-in positional voice chat for all platforms and develop tactical depth, and not rivet paid skins and collaborations. As a result, Among Us remains an important historical monument, but playing it now, when there are a bunch of more dynamic and sophisticated analogues, is simply not interesting.

Recomendado – Perfeito pra jogar com a galera.
Among Us é diversão pura quando você tá com amigos. A tensão de descobrir o impostor e a zoeira das acusações deixa cada partida imprevisível. Apesar de simples, consegue prender bastante tempo e render boas risadas.
Pra quem curte social deduction e quer se divertir sem se estressar demais, é uma ótima pedida.

Pra quem curte social deduction e quer se divertir sem se estressar demais, é uma ótima pedida.
review_english: Recommended Perfect for playing with friends. Among Us is pure fun when you're with friends. For those who enjoy social deduction and want to have fun without getting too stressed, it's a great choice.

review:
Отличная игра за столь небольшие деньги! Если не можете определиться с покупкой, то взгляните на преимущества данной игры:
1. Узнать от школьников ваше место в социуме.
2. Проверить кто из ваших друзей больше всего воздухан.
3. Постоянно исправлять последствия саботажа, бегая в другой конец корабля.
4. Манипулировать экипажем. Достаточно написать "кикайте голубого, т.к он голубой", и ваши союзники одобрят эту идею.
5. Открыть для себя новые термины, такие как: "морф", "щуп", деф на килл", "кд люка" и т.п
6. Испытать ваш профессионализм в области вранья, вешая лапшу на уши.
7. Встретить читеров, которые будут крашить ваши матчи.
8. Понаблюдать за тем, как ваши тиммейты будут приводить аргументы и проявлять попытки мышления, но не всегда успешные.

review: Das Spiel geht irgendwie immer, wenn man mal nicht weiß was man sonst spielen soll. Ich persönlich mags eher nicht das allein zu spielen, aber ich denke in öffentlichen Lobbies kommt man ganz gut zurecht. Das mache ich auch manchmal. Sobald man das (sehr einfache) Spielprinzip verstanden hat, ist es ein selbstläufer. Jede Runde kann, muss aber nicht, fast gleich ablaufen aber durch die verschiedenen Spielmodi, Maps und nicht zu vergessen der Anpassung der eigenen Lobby kann man da echt viel selbst entscheiden und das eigene Spielerlebnis bis zu einem gewissen Punkt auf einen selbst oder die Freundesgruppe anpassen. Meiner Meinung nach irgendwo auch ein Must-Have!

review_english: The game somehow always works when you don't know what else to play. Personally, I don't like playing alone, but I think you can get along quite well in public lobbies. I do that too sometimes. Once you understand the (very simple) game principle, it's a no-brainer. Every round can, but doesn't have to, be almost the same, but thanks to the different game modes, maps and not to forget the customization of your own lobby, you can really decide a lot yourself and adapt your gaming experience to yourself or your group of friends up to a certain point. In my opinion, it's a must-have somewhere!

review: I’m sure most people know, but for the people who don’t, this game is a deduction game where the majority of players are "Crew mates" trying to finish tasks and find the secret "Impostors". Crew mates have roles that no one knows unless you say in chat. Roles like Engineer, Guardian Angel (when you die in the game you get a chance of this role instead of haunting ), scientist, noisemaker, tracker and detective. Impostors get powers like shapeshifter, phantom and viper. As you’re doing your tasks as a crew mate, impostors will be trying to pick you off one by one. If you come across someone's body, you can report it or go to the main room and hit the red button to be able to chat with everyone and say what you saw. Honestly, it’s fun, and it’s a vibe have lots of hours on my switch. I hope to get my hours up on here. haha I wish accounts were linkable to other devices though Lol

review:
⊹ ࣪ ˖ **Recommended** ˖ ࣪ ⊹

Among Us is pure chaos in the best way possible. It is all about pointing fingers, lying badly, blaming your friends, defending yourself with your whole soul, and somehow still looking suspicious even when you are innocent. ⋆˚꩜｡

This game was such a huge hit when so many streamers were playing it, and honestly, it makes sense why. A lot of creators became really big because of this game, and it created so many funny moments, clips, friendships, and absolute betrayals. ✧

The gameplay is simple but so fun. Crewmates have to finish tasks, figure out who the Impostors are, report bodies, and vote people out. Meanwhile, the Impostors are trying to sabotage, lie, sneak around, and get away with everything. It turns into a full drama meeting every time someone finds a body. ˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

What makes Among Us so funny is the people you play with. The game can go from quiet task-doing to everyone yelling over each other in seconds. Someone will say “I saw you vent,” someone else will panic, and suddenly the most innocent person in the lobby gets voted out for no reason. ⟡

It is definitely at its best with friends or a fun group. The game is simple, but the social chaos, accusations, and betrayals make it memorable every time. ⋆˙⟡

Overall, Among Us is funny, messy, dramatic, and full of iconic moments. If you like social deduction games, chaotic friend groups, and blaming people with absolutely no proof, this game is worth playing. ✨

review:
Я играл в Among Us достаточно, чтобы написать на него отзыв, ведь он далёк от совершенства. Это не значит, что игра плоха, просто у неё есть много недостатков. Вот те, которые я нашёл:
 - Плохая модерация и фильтр чата. В данной игре очень много игроков, использующих совершенно некультурную лексику, а фильтр чата, который присутствует в игре, практически ничего не меняет. Также в игре можно ставить любой никнейм, и никто не предупредит, что такое имя неприемлемо. Даже если я увижу такого человека и отправлю на него жалобу, ничего не произойдёт.
 - Токсичные игроки. Во-первых, как упомянуто выше, большинство игроков матерятся, и это очень не приятно. Во-вторых, не редко бывает то, что один или несколько людей разных ролей объединяются против остальных, что уже успели прозвать "тимерством". Также бывают игроки, играющие только для того, чтобы оскорбить или запугать кого-нибудь.
 Данные причины делают игру почти не играбельной для людей, которые не терпят некультурную брань и токсичную речь, и они с этим ничего не поделают. Идея и геймплей прекрасны, но пока, чтобы избежать плохих игроков, приходится играть с быстрым чатом. Надеюсь, разработчики смогут сделать с этим что-нибудь!

review_english: I've played enough of Among Us to write a review of it, because it's far from perfect. This doesn't mean the game is bad, it just has a lot of flaws. Here are the ones I found - Poor moderation and chat filter. There are a lot of players in this game who use completely uncultured language, and the chat filter that is present in the game practically does not change anything. You can also use any nickname in the game, and no one will warn you that such a name is unacceptable. Even if I see such a person and send a complaint against him, nothing will happen. - Toxic players. Firstly, as mentioned above, most players swear, and this is very unpleasant. Secondly, it often happens that one or several people of different roles unite against the rest, which has already been called “timing”. There are also players who play only to insult or intimidate someone. These reasons make the game almost unplayable for people who do not tolerate uncivilized language and toxic speech, and there is nothing they can do about it. The idea and gameplay are great, but for now you have to play with fast chat to avoid bad players. I hope the developers can do something about this!

review:
At first glance, Among Us looks like a simple social deduction game where colorful bean shaped astronauts complete tasks while trying to identify an impostor. In reality, it's a friendship-destroying, trust-shattering psychological experiment disguised as a party game.

Every match begins with optimism and teamwork. Within thirty seconds, someone is screaming accusations with zero evidence, another person is defending themselves like they're in a courtroom drama, and the actual impostor is quietly watching the chaos unfold. Few games can turn "I was doing tasks" into a statement that sounds incredibly suspicious.

Among us isn't just a game, it is a lifestyle.

In reality, it's a friendship-destroying, trust-shattering psychological experiment disguised as a party game. Every match begins with optimism and teamwork. Within thirty seconds, someone is screaming accusations with zero evidence, another person is defending themselves like they're in a courtroom drama, and the actual impostor is quietly watching the chaos unfold. Few games can turn "I was doing tasks" into a statement that sounds incredibly suspicious. Among us isn't just a game, it is a lifestyle.

review:
Among Us is an absolute masterpiece of chaos and betrayal wrapped in a colorful cartoon package. It’s like if Clue and Mafia had a baby during a spaceship emergency, then invited all your friends to watch it unfold in glorious 2D. I’ve sunk way too many hours into this game, and every single session still leaves me crying from laughter or screaming “YOU SUSSY BAKA” at people I genuinely care about.
The beauty of Among Us is how quickly innocent tasks turn into psychological warfare. One minute you’re calmly swiping a card in admin like a responsible crewmate, the next you’re watching your best friend vent right in front of you and gaslight the entire lobby with “I was doing medbay scan, you’re just paranoid.” The emergency meetings are peak comedy — everyone yelling over each other, throwing out the most unhinged accusations while someone is quietly eating popcorn in the vents.
I love the impostor gameplay so much. There’s nothing more satisfying than sabotaging lights and then picking off the most gullible friend while everyone panics in the dark. Or perfectly timing a kill right after someone finishes their task so the body report comes in and the chaos explodes. The impostor wins feel earned, but the crewmate wins where you actually sniff out the liar through pure detective work? Chef’s kiss.
Playing with friends is where the game truly shines. Nothing tests your relationships quite like accusing your ride-or-die duo partner of being sus because they were “too quiet” during the last round. We’ve had full-blown arguments that ended with “bro I saw you kill purple in electrical” only to find out it was actually cyan the whole time. The amount of inside jokes and recurring betrayals we’ve built over the years is priceless.
The updates have kept it fresh too. New maps, roles, and cosmetics mean there’s always something new to mess with. Hiding in vents as an engineer, shapeshifting into your victims, or just vibing as a crewmate trying to finish your tasks while the impostors are running a full murder circus around you — it never gets old.
Even when you lose, it’s hilarious. Getting voted out first because you had the same color as the last impostor, or dying instantly because you walked into a 1v8 murder party in cafeteria. The post-game lobby where everyone roasts each other is basically half the fun.
At the end of the day, Among Us is the perfect party game. It’s easy to pick up, impossible to put down, and guaranteed to create memories (and temporary enemies). Whether you’re playing with 4 friends or 14 randoms, it delivers nonstop entertainment.

review:
The Ultimate Friendship Demolition Derby
I bought this game thinking it would be a fun, casual party game about cute little spacemen fixing a rocket ship. I was entirely wrong. Among Us is not a game about space travel; it is a highly volatile psychological thriller designed to turn your closest friends, family members, and loved ones into calculated, cold-blooded liars. It is a masterclass in gaslighting where a colorful space suit cannot hide the pure deception underneath.

The Illusion of Innocence (The Crewmate Grind)
When you play as a Crewmate, the game feels like a stressful mundane chore simulator. You wander around the ship alone, trying to connect colorful wires, swipe a card at the exact right speed (which is mathematically impossible on the first try), and download data while praying nobody walks into the room behind you. Every single time a door closes automatically, your heart rate spikes to 180 BPM. You find yourself looking at your best friend of ten years with absolute, unfiltered suspicion just because they followed you into Electrical to "help you with your tasks." There are no friends in Electrical. Only victims.

The Art of the Lie (The Impostor Experience)
The moment the screen flashes red and you see the word "Impostor," your entire personality changes. You transform from a peaceful, law-abiding gamer into a Machiavellian villain. You vent through the floorboards, eliminate a crewmate in cold blood, and then immediately report the body yourself. When the emergency meeting starts, you look your real-life sibling dead in the eyes over voice chat and say, "I saw Green do it, I was in MedBay doing my scans, I swear on my life." The terrifying part isn't that you lied; it's how incredibly good at it you become after a few rounds.

The Emergency Meeting Chaos
The chat debates in this game make actual political debates look like peaceful tea parties. The entire voting process is based purely on peer pressure, lack of evidence, and loudest voice wins. Someone will type "Red sus" in the chat with absolutely zero context, and within four seconds, the entire lobby will collectively decide to eject Red into the freezing vacuum of space. You will watch your defense strategy fall apart as your friends scream over each other, change their stories, and vote out the one guy who was actually doing his tasks the entire time.

The Post-Game Trauma
The real damage happens after the match ends. You will sit in the lobby in total silence, realizing that people you trust with your house keys are capable of orchestrating your digital demise without blinking an eye. You will start analyzing the vocal inflections, pauses, and typing speeds of everyone you know, looking for signs of deceit. If you want to know if your friend group can survive a psychological warfare campaign, skip the trust falls and just host an eight-player lobby on Skeld.

Final Verdict: 10/10. It is a beautifully chaotic game that will ruin your trust in humanity but keep you coming back for more. Buy it, watch your back in Navigations, and remember: If they are standing too close to the vent, they are not your friend.

If this review helped you successfully frame an innocent crewmate, give it a thumbs up so I can buy a tiny digital pet to keep me company in the ghost chat.

This game is extremely easy to pick up since it entails playing as crewmates performing brief missions to maintain the spaceship while attempting to determine the identity of the impostors. The secret behind its addictiveness lies in its social experience, which involves strategizing, lying, or collecting evidence about the killers when an emergency meeting is called, and the player tries to get the impostors voted off. With Among Us' adorable cartoon aesthetic and its capability to play across different platforms such as mobile phones, PC, or consoles, it is extremely easy to play games with friends anywhere at any time.

review:
Among Us es un juego multijugador simple pero muy entretenido que pone a prueba tanto la estrategia como la capacidad de engañar o descubrir mentiras. La dinámica consiste en que un grupo de jugadores debe completar tareas dentro de una nave espacial mientras uno o varios impostores intentan sabotear la misión y eliminar a los demás sin ser descubiertos.

Lo mejor del juego es la interacción entre jugadores. Las reuniones para debatir quién podría ser el impostor suelen generar momentos muy divertidos, tensión y situaciones inesperadas. Cada partida puede ser completamente diferente, especialmente cuando se juega con amigos.

Su estilo visual sencillo y sus mecánicas fáciles de aprender hacen que cualquier persona pueda empezar a jugar rápidamente. Aunque después de muchas horas puede volverse repetitivo, la diversión social logra mantenerlo interesante.

Puntuación: 8,5/10. Un juego ideal para jugar en grupo, reírse y poner a prueba la confianza entre amigos.

Lo mejor del juego es la interacción entre jugadores. Las reuniones para debatir quién podría ser el impostor suelen generar momentos muy divertidos, tensión y situaciones inesperadas. Cada partida puede ser completamente diferente, especialmente cuando se juega con amigos. Su estilo visual sencillo y sus mecánicas fáciles de aprender hacen que cualquier persona pueda empezar a jugar rápidamente. Aunque después de muchas horas puede volverse repetitivo, la diversión social logra mantenerlo interesante. Puntuación 8,5 10. Un juego ideal para jugar en grupo, reírse y poner a prueba la confianza entre amigos.
review_english: Among Us is a simple but very entertaining multiplayer game that tests both strategy and the ability to deceive or discover lies. The dynamic consists of a group of players must complete tasks inside a spaceship while one or more impostors try to sabotage the mission and eliminate the others without being discovered. The best thing about the game is the interaction between players. Meetings to discuss who the imposter could be usually generate very funny moments, tension and unexpected situations. Each game can be completely different, especially when played with friends. Its simple visual style and easy-to-learn mechanics mean anyone can start playing quickly. Although after many hours it can become repetitive, the social fun manages to keep it interesting. Score 8.5 10. An ideal game to play in a group, laugh and test trust between friends.

Among Us is fun, but the penalty system really ruins it.  
I’ve been banned multiple times for things I didn’t do on purpose — crashes, disconnects, or even after I was already eliminated. One time the game crashed and I couldn’t play for 12 hours, and another time I couldn’t play for a whole week.

I’m not rage‑quitting, I just want to play normally. The ban system needs to be fixed so it doesn’t punish players for crashes or bad lobbies.

Uma coisa que mudou bastante no jogo foi a adição de habilidades, modos de jogo e novos mapas. Um jogo que se encontra sempre em mudanças que não o torna monótono. Recomendo!!!

review_english: Among Us is a great game to play with friends. I highly recommend it for anyone who enjoys games to solve interactive tasks, puzzles and discover who the impostor is inside a spaceship. One thing that changed a lot in the game was the addition of skills, game modes and new maps. A game that is always undergoing changes that do not make it monotonous. I recommend!!!

review:
Among us é muito bom msm, recomendo, para resolver quem é impostor, classico

Meu unico problema que vc tem que pagar, o jogo, pensei que ia ficar de graça, claro entendo que intersloth tem que fazer pelo menos algum dinheiro do jogo, mas já tem microtransição né
e tbm como MUITOS jogadores só querem jogar o MESMO MAPA, recomendo tentar entrar nos lobbies com mapas diferentes, mas ADIVINHA, boa sorte encontrando pq vc raramente encontra, msm que vc está criando um lobby,
e outro problema é que as vezes os roles confusem muito para novo jogadores, e jogadores que não joguem among us desde 2020 e volta agora, como vc pode entrar nas ventilações como tripulante ou fingir de ser um tripulante, que shapesifter acho meio roubado msm, mas se vc pelo menos tiver muitas provas e certeza que esse cara é impostor

Vc é meio que forçado a colocar o mapa skeld, se quiser ter muitas pessoas no lobby

Conclusão: Among Us é jogo divertido pra jogar com amigos e servidores publicos, só fica com paciencia jogando servidores publicos, pq se falaram se vc é sus, msm sem prova, ja foi ejeitado kkkkkk

review:
Among Us is a game that's really fun to play with friends. The game is easy to play. Each match is different because of the tricks and betrayal. After many years it's still funny trying to convince everyone you are innocent while your friend is clearly lying through voice chat.

The games look is simple but nice and it works well on both computer and phone. I also like that matches are short so it's easy to play without spending a lot of time. The new maps and roles made the game feel new again too.

If you like games where you have to figure out who is tricking you working together with others or just having fun with friends this game is definitely worth playing. Among Us is a game, for that.

review:
Играл в эту игру ещё очень давно на телефоне, и вот что могу сказать. Игра в принципе осталась такой же какой и была раньше но появились некие плюсы и минусы, начнём с того что в игре появились токсик дети которые кикают просто так на абум и даже не разобравшись в деле изза того что на него нагнали начинается жестокое обматерение родных, то есть комьюнити амонг аса изменилось очень сильно на маленьких токсик детей.
   А из плюсов то что в принципе выходят норм обновы и скины тоже, с новыми ролями стало интереснее играть, но интерес игры из за минусов начинает пропадать всё больше и больше.
  В принципе игра очень хорошая.

Игра в принципе осталась такой же какой и была раньше но появились некие плюсы и минусы, начнём с того что в игре появились токсик дети которые кикают просто так на абум и даже не разобравшись в деле изза того что на него нагнали начинается жестокое обматерение родных, то есть комьюнити амонг аса изменилось очень сильно на маленьких токсик детей. А из плюсов то что в принципе выходят норм обновы и скины тоже, с новыми ролями стало интереснее играть, но интерес игры из за минусов начинает пропадать всё больше и больше. В принципе игра очень хорошая.

And one of the advantages is that, in principle, updates and skins are coming out normally, it has become more interesting to play with new roles, but the interest of the game begins to disappear more and more due to the disadvantages. In principle the game is very good.

review:
this game.. changed my whole life forever, always has. back in 2019 There was an among us dancing video.. one part in that video had among us characters running in circles. So obviously what was the most logical thing to do at that age of 7 with my tiny ol little sister, was to yes, you guessed it, run in circles with among us music.. next thing you know i feel face first down falling from the bed. beautiful game, changed my life forever.. ANYWHOO then I acutally got the game and was playing non-stop i know that I only got this steam among us 5 years ago but you need to understand that I didnt have a computer at that time LMAO, so basically heres the story, me and my friends from 2021 got on the game and started playing, some were imposter, some were crewmates, and as a crewmate your job is to complete all tasks while trying to not get hunted down by the imposter, now for the imposter, your a crewmate but theres something different about you, you have the option to kill.. your job is to hunt down everyone in the game untill you and the other imposters are the last ones alive.... so romantic trust, this game truly changed my life forever, i loaded in game, played, people manipulated me, i cried, i died, i got fried, and i died once again, YAYAYYAY truly amazing!! expect to get mad at random kids,

5 star review on App Store too

holy TUFFNESS

-j3sone
